quests.offer: "Bodega across the bridge owes me a favor and I owe them this. {target}. Counter, not the back room. Don't read it, don't drop it, {reward} dollars."
quests.desc: Get the package to a counter in {target} without it growing legs.

quests.offer: "I need this thing in {target} before someone asks me why I have it. Counter, any bodega, {reward}. Fast."
quests.desc: Move the #hustle_noun# to a counter in {target}. The clock is somebody else's problem for now.

quests.offer: "This goes to {target}. Bodega counter. You don't ask what it weighs. I don't explain why you're getting {reward}. We clear?"
quests.desc: Deliver the package to a counter in {target}. High reward. Don't open it.

quests.offer: "Manifest says this left the pier three hours ago. Technically it's already in {target}. Help it get there physically. {reward}."
quests.desc: Finish the transit — get the package to a counter in {target}.

quests.offer: "I cover from here to {target}, no further. You carry this the rest of the way. Counter, any bodega. {reward} and nobody asks you anything."
quests.desc: Carry the package to a counter in {target}. The watchman's jurisdiction ends at the block.

quests.offer: "I've got three people who needed this yesterday. There's a kit somewhere in {target} — bodega counter, someone's holding it. Bring it and I'll pay {reward}. Don't use it."
quests.desc: Find the medkit at a counter in {target} and bring it back.

quests.offer: "Quebec battery, if it's still there. {target}, counter. These things go fast when the grid hiccups. {reward}."
quests.desc: Retrieve the salvage battery from a counter in {target}.

quests.offer: "There are candles kept for the vigil — a counter in {target} is holding them. Blessed stock, specific. I can pay {reward} and my gratitude, which historically has been worth something."
quests.desc: Collect the blackout candle from a counter in {target} and bring it to the preacher.

quests.offer: "I know, I know, they don't work. Still — {target}, counter, there's a token from the old system. Collector's item. {reward} if you don't ask how it got there."
quests.desc: Get the subway token from a counter in {target}.

quests.offer: "Knees. You don't need the story. There's a pack at a counter in {target} — somebody held it for me. {reward} to go get it."
quests.desc: Pick up the painkillers at a counter in {target} and bring them back.

quests.offer: "Copper coils — {qty} of them. I don't care where they came from before you. {reward} when you drop them at the counter."
quests.desc: Scavenge {qty} copper coils and drop them at a counter.

quests.offer: "Scrap. {qty} pieces, any grade. Drop at a counter and I'll know you came by. Pays {reward}."
quests.desc: Collect {qty} scrap metal and turn it in at a counter.

quests.offer: "Bandages are going fast. I need {qty} — wherever you find them. Counter, any bodega nearby. {reward}. Sterile preferred, but I'll take what I can get."
quests.desc: Scavenge {qty} bandages and drop them at a counter.

quests.offer: "There's a counter in {target} that owes me a number. They know what it is. You collect it, I give you {reward}. Don't bring me an argument."
quests.desc: Collect the debt from a counter in {target}. The debtor may have opinions.

quests.offer: "Tab's been running since spring. {target}, counter, they know the number. Tell them I said #collect_phrase#. {reward} for your trouble."
quests.desc: Collect the outstanding tab from a counter in {target}.

quests.offer: "This needs to reach the altar in {target} — hands that haven't carried anything ugly today. I'd go myself but the walk's not mine to make right now. {reward} plus something the faith owes you."
quests.desc: Carry the offering to an altar in {target}. The faith will notice.

quests.offer: "The altar in {target} hasn't been tended. This belongs there. Bring it, say nothing, accept whatever they give you. I'll add {reward}."
quests.desc: Deliver the #holy_item# to an altar in {target} and receive the faith's blessing.

quests.offer: "Package goes to {target}. The people there will know where. You don't need to know more than that. {reward} and you go up a notch with the right people."
quests.desc: Deliver the package to the faction's drop point in {target}. Standing improves.

quests.offer: "Word needs to get to {target}. Official channels are slow or compromised. You walk in, hand it to whoever's running the floor, walk out. {reward}. Simple."
quests.desc: Carry the message to the faction contact in {target}. Don't read it.

hustle_noun: box sealed with tape and optimism
tube somebody capped both ends of
collect_phrase: the number is what the number is
holy_item: bound cloth the color of harbor water
small clay dish you are not to open
